title: デビュー戦の後に・安定で

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay... The debut is officially out of the way.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, I really let 'em have it, didn't I?! Just
kidding.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: So? How do you... think I did?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha! That was so fast! Someone's excited.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well then, let's keep that up when we decide
which race to take on next.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I want to know how you're envisioning our future.
choice_data_list: Which race are you aiming for?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...My aim, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nahhh, do you think I have the right to pick what
I aim for?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You can take the lead here. See, this is where you
can show your training advice skills!

Even before her debut, I felt that she had
potential for medium-distance races. She's great
at maintaining her position in a race, only to
speed up in the final stretch.

What's important now is figuring out how we want
to approach the Classics. When thinking about
where to go first...
choice_data_list: Do you wanna try the Wakagoma Stakes?
Do you wanna try the Wakagoma Stakes?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, I see. You want to see how I do in an
open race.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sounds good. Let's do it.
choice_data_list: Just do what you usually do.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Are you saying you want me to finish third?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: For the record, I don't particularly aim for third place.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...It just always happens to end up that way.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
There's also a monster out there that just
constantly wins every race...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what Teio is doing. Which race is she
going to compete in?

Tokai Teio debuted at the same time as Nice
Nature. No wonder she is curious about her. But...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I know, I know. I'm just hoping that I won't have
to race her.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Anyway, you're right. Let's get down to business.

And so, we decide that her next race is going to
be the Wakagoma Stakes!
